headline: Bitmine Buys $74M Ether Amid Regulatory Optimism

article.title: Bitmine announces $74M Ether buys as chair says ‘greater chances of Clarity Act passage’
article.summary: Bitmine's big buy contrasts with crypto treasury peer Strategy, which reported selling millions of dollars worth of its Bitcoin holdings on Monday.

headline: Stellar Blockchain Payment Initiative Expands Beyond Pilot Phase

article.title: UN agency moves Stellar blockchain payment initiative beyond pilot stage
article.summary: The UN Development Programme said blockchain payment pilots in five countries cut costs, improved resilience and will now inform wider use across its humanitarian and development programs.

headline: Distressed Funds Dump $10B in Strategy Holdings

article.title: Distressed Funds Explore Swap of Strategy Holdings Amid Rout
article.summary: Distressed-debt funds that snapped up Strategy Inc.’s beaten-down preferred shares are in talks with one of the company’s bankers about swapping them for other securities, pitching it as a win-win as the relentless rout in crypto puts the Bitcoin accumulator in an increasingly tough spot.

headline: Gold Slumps 1.2% Ahead of Fed Minutes Release

article.title: Gold Falls as Traders Assess Fed Rate Outlook Ahead of Minutes
article.summary: Gold dropped as traders weighed the outlook for the Federal Reserve’s interest rate path at the start of a week in which the minutes of the US central bank’s last meeting are expected to shed light on policymakers’ thinking.

headline: US Treasury Holds 8,000 BTC Amid ABTC Surge

article.title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
American Bitcoin (Nasdaq: ABTC) said its treasury has surpassed 8,000 BTC.

headline: USDT Flows Into Bitcoin Via Lightning Network Channels

article.title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.

headline: Coinbase AI Errs, Predicts Fake World Cup Score

article.title: Coinbase's AI System Hallucinated a World Cup Result Before the Match Even Started
article.summary: Coinbase said it updated its systems after an AI-generated alert incorrectly reported the outcome of the Norway-Brazil match before kickoff.

article.title: Over 150,000 People Signed Up to Masturbate With AI. Here's Why
article.summary: Joi AI's search for 10 paid "masturbation consultants" drew more than 150,000 applicants. Here's what happened.

article.title: BonkDAO loses $20 million following ‘malicious governance proposal’ attack
article.summary: The funds have been tracked to crypto exchanges, and South Korea-based Upbit said it has suspended BONK deposits and withdrawals.

headline: $1B Genesis Yield Suit Revived Against DCG

article.title: Judge revives fraud claim against Barry Silbert, DCG in Genesis Yield lawsuit
article.summary: The class action centers on Genesis Yield, a lending program that let customers deposit crypto in exchange for interest payments.

article.title: Zelenskyy says ‘battle in the sky’ will decide outcome of war with Russia
article.summary: Ukrainian leader says Donald Trump has changed his mind about the conflict

headline: Ruble Plunges 5% Amid Escalating Ukraine Tensions

article.title: Nato backs Ukraine’s push to hit Russia harder, says Finnish president
article.summary: Alexander Stubb tells FT that long-range drone strikes have changed US views on the war and put Kyiv in ‘best’ position since 2022
